channel.title: Tops on Mengjie Xu
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on Mengjie Xu

item.description: About Me I am Mengjie Xu, a Job Market Candidate at the Frankfurt School of Finance and Management. My research analyzes how information system design influences strategic interactions among market participants and the associated outcomes. Focusing on identifying welfare-improving information system designs and seeking ways to enhance exist ones when they fall short, I am dedicated to conducting research that has real-world relevance and can be of practical use in improving market dynamics.
